text:
```python
import math

xs = [4, 8, 15, 16, 23, 42]

# Calculate the mean
mean = sum(xs) / len(xs)

# Calculate the variance
variance = sum((x - mean) ** 2 for x in xs) / len(xs)

# Calculate the standard deviation
std_dev = math.sqrt(variance)

# Print the result to 2 decimal places
print(f"{std_dev:.2f}")
```
